channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Artemis Crew Returns to Earth, NASA Scientists Celebrate Successful Mission
item.description: The Artemis space mission has concluded successfully, with the crew returning to Earth amid jubilant reactions from NASA scientists. As the spacecraft approached its homecoming, both astronauts and mi...

item.title: 32 Indian Nationals Die While Serving in Russian Army in Ukraine
item.description: A total of 32 Indian nationals have lost their lives while serving in the Russian military on the frontlines of the Ukraine war, with efforts now underway to secure the release of 35 more Indians curr...

item.title: Lil Tjay Arrested After Shooting Incident Involving Offset in Florida
item.description: Drama unfolded at the Seminole Hard Rock Hotel in Florida, where a shooting incident left ex-Migos rapper Offset reportedly injured, and Lil Tjay arrested. Police booked Lil Tjay, born Tione Jayden Me...

item.title: NRL chief supports potential revival of Central Queensland bid for fifth team
item.description: The head of the National Rugby League (NRL) has publicly expressed full support for the idea of a fifth Queensland-based team, signalling strong momentum behind expansion discussions. This renewed int...

item.title: Canberra Housing Crisis: Calls for Government Intervention Intensify
item.description: Canberra's housing crisis is worsening, prompting increasing calls for urgent government action. The situation is impacting renters and prospective homebuyers alike, with affordability rapidly diminis...

item.title: Liberal Finance Minister Faces Conflict of Interest Over High-Speed Rail Deal
item.description: The article discusses the conflict of interest faced by Canadian Finance Minister François-Philippe Champagne, whose partner, Anne-Marie Gaudet, works for Alto, the company behind a proposed $90 billi...

item.title: Department of Sport Postpones National School Sports Championships, Sparking Concerns Over Planning and Accountability
item.description: The Chairperson of the Portfolio Committee on Sport, Arts and Culture, Mr Joe McGluwa, has expressed serious concern over the Department of Sport, Arts and Culture's last-minute postponement of the 20...

item.title: Democrats Question Trump’s Two‑Week Ceasefire with Iran Amid Confusion over Terms
item.description: The Guardian’s live coverage detailed escalating tensions between the United States and Iran following Donald Trump’s announcement of a two‑week ceasefire agreement. The deal, described by Trump as a ...

item.title: Pakistan Mediates as Trump Threatens Iran, Pakistanis Injured in UAE
item.description: Tensions in the Middle East have escalated following a recent conflict involving Iran, prompting international concern and Pakistani involvement in mediation efforts. United States President Donald Tr...

item.title: Khampepe Commission of Inquiry into alleged political interference in TRC cases continues in Johannesburg
item.description: The Khampepe Commission of Inquiry, established to investigate allegations of political interference in the investigation and prosecution of apartheid-era cases referred by the Truth and Reconciliatio...

item.title: Artemis 2 crew makes historic first audio call with ISS astronauts during lunar mission
item.description: The Artemis 2 astronauts, returning from their historic lunar flyby, made a milestone audio call to the crew aboard the International Space Station (ISS), marking the first-ever conversation between c...

item.title: Exploring Early Modern Hindi Literature and Its Impact on South Asian History
item.description: Tyler W Williams' book, *If All the World Were Paper*, delves into the early modern history of written Hindi literature, challenging the conventional Western-centric approach to understanding language...

item.title: Himanta Sarma Responds to Rahul Gandhi's Allegations
item.description: Himanta Biswa Sarma, a prominent political leader from Assam, has responded strongly to remarks made by Congress leader Rahul Gandhi. Sarma has claimed that Gandhi's allegations against him are unfoun...

item.title: New Faction Emerges In ADC, Deepening Leadership Dispute Over Party Legitimacy
item.description: The political tension inside the African Democratic Congress (ADC) don increase again as another group come out for Abuja on Tuesday talk say na dem be the true leaders of the party. This new faction,...

item.title: Limpopo Family Grieves Twin's Passing After Successful Separation
item.description: The Portfolio Committee on Health in South Africa's Parliament has expressed deep sadness over the passing of one of a pair of conjoined twins who underwent a complex separation surgery at Mankwenyeng...

item.title: Scott Mills temporarily steps down from MS Society ambassador role following BBC dismissal
item.description: Scott Mills, the former BBC Radio 2 presenter, is stepping back from his long-standing role as an ambassador for the MS Society. Mills, 53, was dismissed by the BBC after it emerged that a historical ...

item.title: Jonathan Black-Branch Disbarred in England and Wales Following Misuse of University Funds, Canada-Wide Arrest Warrant Active
item.description: Jonathan Black-Branch, the former dean of the University of Manitoba law school, has been disbarred in England and Wales following his earlier disbarment in Manitoba in 2024. The Bar Standards Board o...

item.title: Visitors risk safety and disturb wildlife by approaching Highland cows at Hampshire parks
item.description: Recent viral social media attention on Highland cows has led to a surge in visitors at Butser Hill in Hampshire and Hothfield Heathlands in Kent. Despite clear warnings from park authorities not to ap...

item.title: American journalist Shelly Kittleson freed following abduction in Baghdad
item.description: American freelance journalist Shelly Kittleson has been released following her abduction from a street corner in Baghdad last week. Kittleson, 49, had previously lived abroad and established a reputab...

item.title: Anthropic Launches Project Glasswing to Strengthen AI Cybersecurity with Industry Partners
